ch10_start.text: The klaxons change to a deafening, continuous wail. The organism is attacking in force. A massive surge of dark water and tendrils bursts through the primary ventilation shafts, flooding the safe zones.

ch10_attack.text: The station layout on your PDA turns entirely red. 50% of the station is now uninhabitable. You hear screams over the comms. David is trapped in Security, and Maya is crying from the vents near the Mess Hall. You can only save one.

choices.text: Rush to Security to save David.
Rush to the Mess Hall to save Maya.
Save yourself and flee to the upper decks.

ch10_save_david.text: You fight your way to Security. The water is waist-deep. David is pinned under a fallen server rack. You manage to heave it off him just as the tendrils break through the reinforced glass.

ch10_save_maya.text: You sprint to the Mess Hall. The room is flooded, but Maya is clinging to a ceiling pipe. You wade through the dark water, feeling the organism brush against your legs, and pull her onto your shoulders.

ch10_save_self.text: You ignore the screams and sprint for the primary elevator. The guilt gnaws at you, but survival is the only priority. The screams abruptly stop, replaced by the horrific sound of assimilation.

ch10_end.text: You reach the upper decks, gasping for air. The organism isn't just killing; it's absorbing memories and knowledge. It knows the station's layout better than the crew does now. (Act 2 Complete)
